name: Lowcal Pineapple Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Wheat germ or crushed cereal
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the cottage cheese, egg whites, Sweet 'n Low sweetener, lemon juice, and vanilla extract in a food processor until smooth.
2. Dissolve the gelatin in the pineapple juice.
3. Stir the dissolved gelatin into the cheese mixture.
4. Add the pineapple (drained) and cinnamon to the mixture.
5. Pour the filling into a 9-inch pie plate lined with Pam cooking spray.
6. Sprinkle the wheat germ over the top of the filling.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until set.
8. Let cool before cutting.
